scripts.test: hugo --gc --minify && test -f public/index.html && grep -q 'function applyFilters' public/news/index.html && grep -q 'function setFilter' public/news/index.html && ! grep -q 'filterPosts(' public/news/index.html && ! grep -q 'filterNews(' public/news/index.html && echo '✅ All verification passed'
